stage149a.claim: Side to Side was released after June 2 , 2016 .
stage149a.evidence: '' Side to Side '' is a song recorded by American singer Ariana Grande , released on August 30 , 2016 , as the third single from her studio album , Dangerous Woman ( 2016 ) .

failure_cause.explanation: The phrase 'Side to Side' is a song title, not a route. The analyzer extracted side->side on both claim and evidence and treated it as a route/order signal.

recommended_patch.goal: Implement route_order_reversal_v2 with conservative self-loop and title/context guards.
requirements: Reject any directional route whose canonical source equals canonical destination.
Do not trigger on self-loop routes such as side->side.
Add conservative title/context guard for quoted or title-like phrases around to-patterns.
Do not modify source predictions or final logits.

remaining_risks: Other title-like to-phrases may still cause false positives unless guarded.
Route extraction remains deterministic and pattern-based.
Complex route language and implicit directionality remain untested.
Broader route/order use must be re-run after Stage150 patch.

next_stage_recommendation.goal: Patch route/order analyzer into v2 and re-run Stage147-B plus Stage148-A.
avoid: broad route/order deployment before v2 revalidation
